name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI 推出的对话式 AI 助手，支持文本生成、代码编写、创意写作等多种场景。
description_en: OpenAI's conversational AI assistant supporting text generation, coding, creative writing, and more.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic 开发的 AI 助手，擅长长文本分析、代码审查和复杂推理任务。
description_en: Anthropic's AI assistant, excels at long-text analysis, code review, and complex reasoning.

name: Gemini
description: Google 的多模态 AI 模型，深度集成 Google 生态，支持文本、图像、代码理解。
description_en: Google's multimodal AI model, deeply integrated with Google ecosystem, supporting text, image, and code understanding.

name: Midjourney
description: 顶级的 AI 图像生成工具，以艺术风格和高质量输出闻名。
description_en: Top-tier AI image generation tool, renowned for artistic style and high-quality output.

name: DALL·E 3
description: OpenAI 的图像生成模型，擅长理解复杂提示词，生成准确且创意的图片。
description_en: OpenAI's image generation model, excels at understanding complex prompts and creating accurate, creative images.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: 开源的图像生成模型，可在本地运行，社区生态丰富。
description_en: Open-source image generation model that runs locally with a rich community ecosystem.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI 的文字转视频模型，可生成长达一分钟的高质量视频。
description_en: OpenAI's text-to-video model, capable of generating high-quality videos up to one minute long.

name: Runway
description: 专业的 AI 视频编辑和生成平台，提供丰富的视频创作工具。
description_en: Professional AI video editing and generation platform with a comprehensive suite of creative tools.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: GitHub 出品的 AI 编程助手，深度集成主流 IDE，根据上下文生成代码。
description_en: GitHub's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with popular IDEs, generating code from context.

name: Cursor
description: AI 优先的代码编辑器，基于 VS Code，内建对话式编程体验。
description_en: AI-first code editor based on VS Code with built-in conversational programming experience.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: Vercel 推出的 AI 前端开发工具，通过自然语言描述生成 UI 代码。
description_en: Vercel's AI frontend development tool that generates UI code from natural language descriptions.

name: ElevenLabs
description: 领先的 AI 语音合成平台，支持多种语言的文本转语音和声音克隆。
description_en: Leading AI voice synthesis platform supporting multilingual text-to-speech and voice cloning.

name: Suno
description: AI 音乐生成工具，通过文字描述即可创作完整的歌曲。
description_en: AI music generation tool that creates complete songs from text descriptions.

name: Notion AI
description: Notion 内置的 AI 功能，辅助写作、总结、翻译和头脑风暴。
description_en: Notion's built-in AI features for writing assistance, summarization, translation, and brainstorming.

name: Gamma
description: AI 驱动的演示文稿和文档创建工具，快速生成精美的 PPT 和网页文档。
description_en: AI-powered presentation and document creation tool for quickly generating polished slides and web docs.

name: Perplexity
description: AI 搜索引擎，提供带来源引用的准确答案，适合研究和事实查询。
description_en: AI-powered search engine providing accurate answers with source citations, ideal for research and fact-checking.

name: Consensus
description: AI 学术搜索引擎，直接从科研论文中提取和总结研究发现。
description_en: AI academic search engine that extracts and summarizes findings directly from research papers.

name: Jasper
description: 面向营销团队的 AI 内容创作平台，擅长博客、广告文案和社交媒体。
description_en: AI content creation platform for marketing teams, specializing in blogs, ad copy, and social media content.

name: Windsurf
description: Codeium 推出的 AI IDE，支持多文件编辑和上下文感知的代码生成。
description_en: Codeium's AI IDE with multi-file editing and context-aware code generation.

name: Leonardo.ai
description: 面向游戏和设计领域的 AI 图像生成平台，擅长游戏资产和概念艺术。
description_en: AI image generation platform for gaming and design, specializing in game assets and concept art.

name: DeepSeek
description: 深度求索推出的开源大模型，推理能力突出，V3.2-Thinking 版本在 SuperCLUE 榜单中位列开源模型全球前列。
description_en: Open-source LLM from DeepSeek with outstanding reasoning capabilities, ranking among the top open-source models globally on SuperCLUE.

name: Kimi
description: 月之暗面推出的 AI 助手，以超长上下文和代码生成见长，K2.5-Thinking 在 SuperCLUE 代码生成任务中排名全球第一。
description_en: Moonshot AI's assistant, excelling at ultra-long context and code generation. K2.5-Thinking ranked #1 globally in code generation on SuperCLUE.

name: 通义千问
description: 阿里巴巴推出的通用大模型，数学推理能力并列全球第一，支持多模态理解与生成。
description_en: Alibaba's general-purpose LLM, tied for #1 globally in mathematical reasoning, with multimodal understanding and generation.

name: 豆包
description: 字节跳动推出的 AI 助手，国内用户量领先，深度集成抖音生态，支持对话、图像和视频理解。
description_en: ByteDance's AI assistant with a massive user base, deeply integrated with TikTok ecosystem, supporting chat, image, and video understanding.

name: Grok
description: Elon Musk 旗下 X.AI 推出的 AI 助手，可实时访问 X（Twitter）数据，回答风格幽默直接。
description_en: X.AI's AI assistant by Elon Musk, with real-time access to X (Twitter) data and a witty, unfiltered conversational style.

name: 文心一言
description: 百度推出的知识增强大模型，深度整合百度搜索生态，擅长中文理解和知识问答。
description_en: Baidu's knowledge-enhanced LLM, deeply integrated with Baidu Search, excelling in Chinese language understanding and knowledge Q&A.

name: Flux
description: Stable Diffusion 原团队 Black Forest Labs 推出的图像生成模型，画质和文字渲染能力业界领先。
description_en: Image generation model by the original Stable Diffusion team at Black Forest Labs, with industry-leading image quality and text rendering.

name: Ideogram
description: 以文字渲染见长的 AI 图像生成工具，可在图片中准确生成清晰的文字和 Logo。
description_en: AI image generation tool specializing in text rendering, capable of accurately generating clear text and logos within images.

name: Pika
description: Pika Labs 推出的 AI 视频生成工具，支持文字/图片转视频，创意效果丰富，操作简单。
description_en: AI video generation tool by Pika Labs, supporting text/image-to-video with rich creative effects and easy operation.

name: HeyGen
description: AI 数字人视频生成平台，支持虚拟主播、视频翻译和口型同步，广泛用于营销和教育。
description_en: AI avatar video generation platform supporting virtual hosts, video translation, and lip-sync, widely used in marketing and education.

name: 可灵
description: 快手推出的 AI 视频生成工具，支持文字和图片生成高质量短视频，物理效果逼真。
description_en: Kuaishou's AI video generation tool, creating high-quality short videos from text and images with realistic physics effects.

name: 即梦
description: 字节跳动推出的 AI 创作平台，支持图片和视频生成，与抖音生态深度打通。
description_en: ByteDance's AI creative platform supporting image and video generation, deeply integrated with the TikTok/Douyin ecosystem.

name: Devin
description: Cognition AI 推出的全球首个 AI 软件工程师，可自主规划、编码、调试并部署完整项目。
description_en: The world's first AI software engineer by Cognition AI, capable of autonomously planning, coding, debugging, and deploying complete projects.

name: Bolt.new
description: StackBlitz 推出的 AI 全栈开发工具，在浏览器中用自然语言直接生成并运行完整 Web 应用。
description_en: StackBlitz's AI full-stack development tool that generates and runs complete web apps directly in the browser from natural language.

name: Lovable
description: 自然语言生成全栈应用的 AI 开发平台，支持快速构建 SaaS 产品、后台系统和 Web 应用。
description_en: AI development platform that generates full-stack apps from natural language, supporting rapid building of SaaS products, backends, and web apps.

name: Replit AI
description: Replit 在线 IDE 内建的 AI 编程助手，支持对话式编程、代码生成和即时部署。
description_en: Built-in AI coding assistant in Replit's online IDE, supporting conversational programming, code generation, and instant deployment.

name: 海螺 AI
description: MiniMax 推出的 AI 语音与创作平台，支持语音合成、AI 音乐和智能对话。
description_en: MiniMax's AI voice and creation platform, supporting voice synthesis, AI music, and intelligent conversation.

name: Descript
description: AI 驱动的音视频编辑工具，像编辑文档一样编辑播客和视频，自动转录、去口癖、AI 配音。
description_en: AI-powered audio/video editor that lets you edit podcasts and videos like documents, with auto-transcription, filler removal, and AI voiceover.

name: 讯飞听见
description: 科大讯飞推出的语音转文字平台，支持实时语音识别、会议记录和多语种翻译。
description_en: iFlytek's speech-to-text platform, supporting real-time voice recognition, meeting transcription, and multi-language translation.

name: 秘塔 AI
description: AI 搜索引擎，提供结构化答案和思维导图，适合深度研究和知识整理。
description_en: AI search engine providing structured answers and mind maps, ideal for deep research and knowledge organization.

name: 天工 AI
description: 昆仑万维推出的 AI 搜索与创作平台，集成搜索、写作、编程等多功能于一体。
description_en: Kunlun Tech's AI search and creation platform, integrating search, writing, coding, and more in one place.

name: Phind
description: 面向开发者的 AI 搜索引擎，针对编程和技术问题提供精准答案和代码示例。
description_en: AI search engine for developers, providing precise answers and code examples for programming and technical questions.

name: You.com
description: 隐私优先的 AI 搜索引擎，支持多模型切换，可同时搜索网页、图片、视频和代码。
description_en: Privacy-first AI search engine with multi-model switching, searching across web, images, videos, and code simultaneously.
